===== start exec cmd: [display device manufacture-info] =====
<LAB-AS-SINGLE>
<LAB-AS-SINGLE>display device manufacture-info
Slot  Sub  Serial-number          Manu-date
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
0     -    1020LAB000001           2020-12-09
<LAB-AS-SINGLE>
===== end exec cmd =====
